message:
fix(reddit): map RateLimited to FcpError::RateLimited instead of FcpError::External

Reddit was the only connector mapping rate limit errors to FcpError::External
instead of FcpError::RateLimited, preventing the FCP framework from applying
rate-limit-specific backoff strategies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
